info.name: Feni Blood Line API
info.description: Complete API collection for Feni Blood Line — blood donor discovery and emergency blood request platform.

request.description: Check if the API is running.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Called immediately after Google Sign-In. Verifies the Firebase token, creates the user if new, or returns existing user. No request body needed — user info is extracted from the token.

response.name: 200 OK — User synced
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User synced successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "firebaseUid": "firebase_uid_here",
    "fullName": "Ruhul Amin",
    "email": "ruhul@example.com",
    "profileImageUrl": "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/...",
    "isAvailableToDonate": false,
    "isProfileComplete": false,
    "isBlocked": false,
    "donationCount": 0,
    "createdAt": "2024-06-04T12:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2024-06-04T12:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

response.name: 401 Unauthorized

request.description: Returns the authenticated user's full profile.

request.description:
Complete the user profile. Required before enabling donor availability. All 4 fields are required.

**bloodGroup** options: A+, A-, B+, B-, AB+, AB-, O+, O-
**location** options: Feni Sadar, Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Chhagalnaiya, Daganbhuiyan, Parshuram
**phoneNumber**: Bangladeshi format (01XXXXXXXXX or +8801XXXXXXXXX)

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Profile completed successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "fullName": "Ruhul Amin",
    "email": "ruhul@example.com",
    "phoneNumber": "01712345678",
    "bloodGroup": "B+",
    "location": "Feni Sadar",
    "isAvailableToDonate": false,
    "isProfileComplete": true,
    "isBlocked": false,
    "donationCount": 0
  }
}

response.name: 400 Validation Error

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Ruhul Amin",
  "phoneNumber": "01712345678",
  "bloodGroup": "B+",
  "location": "Feni Sadar",
  "homeAddress": "123 Main Road, Feni Sadar"
}

request.description:
Update an already-completed profile. All fields are optional — send only the ones you want to change. At least one field must be provided. Profile must be complete before calling this endpoint.

**bloodGroup** options: A+, A-, B+, B-, AB+, AB-, O+, O-
**location** options: Feni Sadar, Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Chhagalnaiya, Daganbhuiyan, Parshuram
**phoneNumber**: Bangladeshi format (01XXXXXXXXX or +8801XXXXXXXXX)

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Profile updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",
    "fullName": "Ruhul Amin",
    "email": "ruhul@example.com",
    "phoneNumber": "01712345678",
    "bloodGroup": "B+",
    "location": "Feni Sadar",
    "homeAddress": "123 Main Road, Feni Sadar",
    "isAvailableToDonate": true,
    "isProfileComplete": true,
    "isBlocked": false
  }
}

response.name: 400 No Fields Provided
400 Profile Not Complete

request.description: Enable donor availability. Profile must be complete first, and user must not be blocked.

response.name: 200 OK
400 Profile Incomplete

request.description: Mark yourself as unavailable for donation.

query.description: Optional. One of: A+, A-, B+, B-, AB+, AB-, O+, O-
Optional. One of: Feni Sadar, Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Chhagalnaiya, Daganbhuiyan, Parshuram

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns paginated list of available donors. All filters are optional — omit any to search across all values. Only returns donors who are available, have a complete profile, and are not blocked.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Donors retrieved successfully",

    {
      "id": "665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d",

    "totalPages": 1

response.name: 400 Invalid Blood Group

body.raw:
{
  "patientName": "Rafi H.",
  "hospitalName": "Feni General Hospital",
  "bloodGroup": "O+",
  "urgency": "URGENT",
  "address": "Feni Sadar, Feni District, Chittagong Division",
  "contactNumber": "01812345678",

  "location": "Feni Sadar",
  "notes": "Urgent need for surgery patient. Please contact immediately."
}

request.description:
Public endpoint. Hospitals or individuals submit an emergency blood request. Auto-sets status to OPEN.

**urgency** options: URGENT, HIGH, NEEDED
**bloodGroup** options: A+, A-, B+, B-, AB+, AB-, O+, O-
**location** options: Feni Sadar, Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Chhagalnaiya, Daganbhuiyan, Parshuram
**unitsNeeded**: 1–20
**notes**: Optional, max 500 chars

Test script auto-saves returned `_id` to `{{request_id}}` collection variable.

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Emergency blood request submitted successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "665f2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f",
    "patientName": "Rafi H.",
    "hospitalName": "Feni General Hospital",
    "bloodGroup": "O+",
    "urgency": "URGENT",
    "address": "Feni Sadar, Feni District",
    "contactNumber": "01812345678",
    "unitsNeeded": 2,
    "location": "Feni Sadar",
    "status": "OPEN",
    "notes": "Urgent need for surgery patient.",
    "createdAt": "2024-06-04T14:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2024-06-04T14:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

response.name: 400 Validation Error

query.description: Optional. Partial, case-insensitive search on hospital name
Optional. Default: OPEN. One of: OPEN, FULFILLED, CANCELLED

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns paginated blood requests. Defaults to OPEN status. Can be filtered by hospitalName (partial match), bloodGroup, location, and status.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Blood requests retrieved successfully",

    }

  "meta": {

item.name: List Blood Requests — Filter by Group + Location + Hospital

request.description: List requests filtered by blood group, location, and hospital name (partial, case-insensitive match).
Public endpoint. Fetch a single blood request by its MongoDB ObjectId. Uses `{{request_id}}` variable set automatically when creating a request.

response.name: 200 OK
404 Not Found

request.description: Update the status of a blood request. Valid values: OPEN, FULFILLED, CANCELLED.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Calls a protected endpoint without Authorization header.
Triggers Zod validation rejection on query param.
